title: ophrys reinholdii subsp. antiochiana
intro: Ophrys reinholdii subsp. antiochiana is a rare, endemic orchid species found in Cyprus, classified under the genus Ophrys, which includes bee orchids. Traditionally, Ophrys reinholdii subsp. antiochiana has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as wound healing, reduced fever, and relief from respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's aerial parts are often used to create infusions, teas, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
